title: Sensitivity
answer: Key cohort separations are tested across multiple defensible weight profiles.

title: Bootstrap
skeptic_question: Do small samples break the conclusion?
answer: Median cohort scores are resampled with uncertainty intervals.

title: Leave-one-out
skeptic_question: Is one unusual session driving the result?
answer: Each session is removed one at a time and cohort medians are recomputed.

title: Functional efficiency
skeptic_question: Are useful modalities being forced to look low burden?
answer: Burden and functional output are separated.

title: Cohort separation
answer: Nonparametric tests and effect sizes compare key cohorts.

title: Evidence linkage
skeptic_question: How does this connect to risk review?
answer: Outputs link to reviewer questions without making legal conclusions.

title: Chronology/source linkage
answer: Cohort findings link to chronology and source attachment review.

title: Protocol/source linkage
skeptic_question: Can risk be handled without categorical exclusion?
answer: Structured protocol fields connect evidence to actual-risk review.

title: Model/version/artifact lock
skeptic_question: Is the model a moving target?
answer: Formula, outputs, validation files, and hashes are version locked.
